TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kawakawasan_ratoh_no_‚ÄôAmisPangcah, title = Kawakawasan_ratoh_no_‚ÄôAmisPangcah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kawakawasan_ratoh_no_‚ÄôAmisPangcah} }

S.FORM: == Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah == "Milikatay wawa to fafahiya"-Tiyamacan ato "Wawa no riyar kawas" -Felalakac.("ÁôľŚÖČÁöĄŚ•≥Ś≠©"TiyamacanŤąá"śĶ∑Á•ěšĻčŚ≠ź"Felalakac) Ci Tiyamacan, o cecay fafahiya kawas no 'Amis/Pangcah, nawhani o makapahay fafahiyan kaolahen no wawa no riyar ci Falalakac nicefisan malafafahi, orasaka mala o tato'asan to no laloma'an no 'Amis/Pangcah. Ci Tiyamacan o sasafaay wawa to fafahiyan no tasaay kawas ci Madapidap ato ci Keseng. Matira ko soal o samakapahay nengnengen cingra, nikaitiyad ho no ina caay ho kahofaoc i malikat ci'edil saan, citiyad ho ci Madapidap malikat ko 'edil, ikor no kahofoc malokaolahan no laloma'an kaomi'en. Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, tayra i 'alo ci Tiyamacan miradom i, manengneng no wawa no riyar kawas ci Felalakac, kaimahen ni Felalakac kokakapah ningra, nanoya ngitangicen ni Felalakac a malafafahi, o laloma'an ni Tiyamac caay ka sakaala ni Felalakac, tafone to papah no kilang a misimed, palimeken to i laloma' kongkong no kilang ano eca i tatahengan misimed, nikawrira nika milikatay matedi ko tireng ni Tiyamacan mahapineng manengneng, marketer to ci Felalakac pacefcef han to ningra ko riyar i hekal, masanga' to ko lenlen maalol tayra i riyar ci Tiyamacan, itiya patanic han malafafahi. Mapawpaw ci Tiyamacan i riyar, o mama ato ina ningra itira i salawacan no riyar mikotod pasariyar tangasa i kawali ka'amis no Takidis, mafana' o caacaay to pakaliyas ci Felalakasan sato, itiya laliyas sato mama ato ina, nanoya ci Madapidap ato ci Keseng o ka'ilolan to wawa ci Tiyamacan, mala o Dakidakit ato Arongay misimaw i salawacan no riyar. Katengilan no sowal, mapaci'eci kalofafahien ci Tiyamacan i, makakeleng ko kakarayan, o todong pitifekan ningra to felac; ano ci langod ko riyar i, o pifalahan ningra to 'asad ato afih, oy ana 'asad ato afih malapodaw, o kadademakan no kidacay foting i riyar, o todong piwangawang ningra to kamay. "Milikatay wawa to fafahiya"- no satapangan to'asan Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah. Iti:ya ho, ina no kawas ci Madapidap ato mama no kawas ci Keseng a tasaay fa'elohay kawas, malikelon cangra itira 'akawangay katimolay kitakit a Arapanapanayan lotok, misofoc to fainayan kawas ci Ladi'afo, Dadakiyolo, Apotok, Lalakan, fafahiyan kawas ci Doc, Tiyamacan a 'enem wawa a kawas. Nikawrira ya cipoyapoy ko ina a kawas ci Tiyamacan i, ira ko malikatay i tiyad, mahapinang manengneng ko laloma'ay, masofoc mahapinang o makapahay nengnengen o fafahiya wawa a kawas. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, o safa fafahiyan masadak a miladom, i fatad no lalan malitemoh ko wawa no riyar kawas ci Felalakacan, nanoya maolah patangic a malofafahien, nanoya paro no loma' misakimokimor misimed milaliw. Nikawrira manengneng caay pakasimed, marketer a palalenlen to sapicefis to sasafaay a safa to fafahiyan milaliw. O ka'ilol no ina ci Madapidap to sasafaay wawa to fafahiyan, mala molengaway i tonotono'an a Dakidakit, o mama ci Keseng mala Arongay misimaw to salawacan no riyar; o sakakaay ci Tadi'Afo milimek tayra i lotok, ikor mala tato'asan no Atayal finacadan; saka tosa a kaka ci Dadakiyolo milaliw pasi'etip mala o tato'asan no 'etipay yincumin; saka tolo a wawa ci Apotok milaliw pasitimol mala tato'asan no Iwatan(Ponon) finacadan; saka sepat a safa ci Lalakan ato saka lima safa to fafahiyan ci Doci i ta'akay riyar, midakaw to toptop mapawpaw i lenlen, nikawrira caay pakatama to hakal, caay pakatama to loma', matatangic a tatosa. Talifahal sa ira ko 'arikak, oni ta'ian nira masataporoay masadak i riyar, o nian koya ikoray a Cilangasan. Mata'elif ko romi'ami'ad, mato'as to cangra tatosa, caay pakatama to roma maloramod, nanoyaan o nia malikakaay raramod sato cangra. Sa'ayaw o nisofocan nangra tatosa o kalingsesan pina'orip, tinako o Kangic, Tatakaay, Fafirung, Harokay. Tatodong sa pasilaeno ko nengneng no Cidal kawas, miocor to saka falo a wawa a kawas ci Tatakusan a minengneng, talifahal sa pakanengneng cangra tatosa to nai kakarayan kawas malokelon, nawhani metalaw sapilaliwan a mitefoc, fo'otan no kawas a miliclic to kamatira no demak. Itiya mafana' to demakan, songila' han to ni Tatakusan pasifana' ko ina no kawas, sasini'ada sa ko Cdal, ocoren ho ko wawa kawas malikelon mihinom tina malikakaay, mihayda miocor to midipotay kawas a malikelon. Sanoyaan ci Salalacal ato Saoriyan a kawas mihawikid to cecay aol tayni hekal pasifana' samaanen ko kadadi'i i naikoran a mafadocay no lenlen a malikakaay, itiya manga'ay ko kaciwawa. Pasifana' han to ni Tatakusan: "Nawhani o malikakaay kamo tatosa, caay kanga'ay mararamod, orasaka kelongen ko sikal, palaed tamonan tatosa, haenen ta manga'ay madadi'i ko kaciwawa namo." Nanoyaan ikor ciwawa cangra malikaka to toloay wawa to fafahiya ato cecay fainayan, o nian ko tato'asan no tamdamdaw. No kawas a rayray.
S.PHON: == kawakawasan rato~uńß no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß == "mi…ĺikataj wawa to~u fafańßija"-tijama ¶an ato~u "wawa no~u rijar kawas" -f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶.("*****"tijama ¶an*"****"f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶) ¶i tijama ¶an, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj fafańßija kawas no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß, nawńßani o~u makapańßaj fafańßijan kao~u…ĺańß…ôn no~u wawa no~u rijar ¶i fa…ĺa…ĺaka ¶ ni ¶…ôfisan ma…ĺafafańßi, o~urasaka ma…ĺa o~u tato~u °asan to~u no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß. ¶i tijama ¶an o~u sasafaaj wawa to~u fafańßijan no~u tasaaj kawas ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap ato~u ¶i k…ôs…ôŇč. matira ko~u so~ua…ĺ o~u samakapańßaj n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn ¶iŇčra, nikaitija…¨~…ģ ńßo~u no~u ina ¶aaj ńßo~u kańßo~ufao~u ¶ i ma…ĺikat ¶i °…ô…¨~…ģi…ĺ saan, ¶itija…¨~…ģ ńßo~u ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap ma…ĺikat ko~u °…ô…¨~…ģi…ĺ, iko~ur no~u kańßo~ufo~u ¶ ma…ĺo~ukao~u…ĺańßan no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an kao~umi °…ôn. kawakawasan rato~uńß no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß. ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, tajra i °a…ĺo~u ¶i tijama ¶an mira…¨~…ģo~um i, man…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u wawa no~u rijar kawas ¶i f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶, kaimańß…ôn ni f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶ ko~ukakapańß niŇčra, nano~uja ŇčitaŇči ¶…ôn ni f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶ a ma…ĺafafańßi, o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ni tijama ¶ ¶aaj ka sakaa…ĺa ni f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶, tafo~un…ô to~u papańß no~u ki…ĺaŇč a misim…ô…¨~…ģ, pa…ĺim…ôk…ôn to~u i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° ko~uŇčko~uŇč no~u ki…ĺaŇč ano~u …ô ¶a i tatańß…ôŇčan misim…ô…¨~…ģ, nikawrira nika mi…ĺikataj mat…ô…¨~…ģi ko~u tir…ôŇč ni tijama ¶an mańßapin…ôŇč man…ôŇčn…ôŇč, mark…ôt…ôr to~u ¶i f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶ pa ¶…ôf ¶…ôf ńßan to~u niŇčra ko~u rijar i ńß…ôka…ĺ, masaŇča ° to~u ko~u …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn maa…ĺo~u…ĺ tajra i rijar ¶i tijama ¶an, itija patani ¶ ńßan ma…ĺafafańßi. mapawpaw ¶i tijama ¶an i rijar, o~u mama ato~u ina niŇčra itira i sa…ĺawa ¶an no~u rijar miko~uto~u…¨~…ģ pasarijar taŇčasa i kawa…ĺi ka °amis no~u taki…¨~…ģis, mafana ° o~u ¶aa ¶aaj to~u paka…ĺijas ¶i f…ô…ĺa…ĺakasan sato~u, itija …ĺa…ĺijas sato~u mama ato~u ina, nano~uja ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap ato~u ¶i k…ôs…ôŇč o~u ka °i…ĺo~u…ĺan to~u wawa ¶i tijama ¶an, ma…ĺa o~u …¨~…ģaki…¨~…ģakit ato~u aro~uŇčaj misimaw i sa…ĺawa ¶an no~u rijar. kat…ôŇči…ĺan no~u so~uwa…ĺ, mapa ¶i °…ô ¶i ka…ĺo~ufafańßi…ôn ¶i tijama ¶an i, makak…ô…ĺ…ôŇč ko~u kakarajan, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč pitif…ôkan niŇčra to~u f…ô…ĺa ¶; ano~u ¶i …ĺaŇčo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u rijar i, o~u pifa…ĺańßan niŇčra to~u °asa…¨~…ģ ato~u afińß, o~uj ana °asa…¨~…ģ ato~u afińß ma…ĺapo~u…¨~…ģaw, o~u ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômakan no~u ki…¨~…ģa ¶aj fo~utiŇč i rijar, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč piwaŇčawaŇč niŇčra to~u kamaj. "mi…ĺikataj wawa to~u fafańßija"- no~u satapaŇčan to~u °asan kawakawasan rato~uńß no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß. iti:ja ńßo~u, ina no~u kawas ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap ato~u mama no~u kawas ¶i k…ôs…ôŇč a tasaaj fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj kawas, ma…ĺik…ô…ĺo~un ¶aŇčra itira °akawaŇčaj katimo~u…ĺaj kitakit a arapanapanajan …ĺo~uto~uk, miso~ufo~u ¶ to~u fainajan kawas ¶i …ĺa…¨~…ģi °afo~u, …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģakijo~u…ĺo~u, apo~uto~uk, …ĺa…ĺakan, fafańßijan kawas ¶i …¨~…ģo~u ¶, tijama ¶an a °…ôn…ôm wawa a kawas. nikawrira ja ¶ipo~ujapo~uj ko~u ina a kawas ¶i tijama ¶an i, ira ko~u ma…ĺikataj i tija…¨~…ģ, mańßapinaŇč man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj, maso~ufo~u ¶ mańßapinaŇč o~u makapańßaj n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn o~u fafańßija wawa a kawas. ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u safa fafańßijan masa…¨~…ģak a mi…ĺa…¨~…ģo~um, i fata…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺa…ĺan ma…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u wawa no~u rijar kawas ¶i f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶an, nano~uja mao~u…ĺańß pataŇči ¶ a ma…ĺo~ufafańßi…ôn, nano~uja paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° misakimo~ukimo~ur misim…ô…¨~…ģ mi…ĺa…ĺiw. nikawrira man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ¶aaj pakasim…ô…¨~…ģ, mark…ôt…ôr a pa…ĺa…ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn to~u sapi ¶…ôfis to~u sasafaaj a safa to~u fafańßijan mi…ĺa…ĺiw. o~u ka °i…ĺo~u…ĺ no~u ina ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap to~u sasafaaj wawa to~u fafańßijan, ma…ĺa mo~u…ĺ…ôŇčawaj i to~uno~uto~uno~u °an a …¨~…ģaki…¨~…ģakit, o~u mama ¶i k…ôs…ôŇč ma…ĺa aro~uŇčaj misimaw to~u sa…ĺawa ¶an no~u rijar; o~u sakakaaj ¶i ta…¨~…ģi °afo~u mi…ĺim…ôk tajra i …ĺo~uto~uk, iko~ur ma…ĺa tato~u °asan no~u ataja…ĺ fina ¶a…¨~…ģan; saka to~usa a kaka ¶i …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģakijo~u…ĺo~u mi…ĺa…ĺiw pasi °…ôtip ma…ĺa o~u tato~u °asan no~u °…ôtipaj jin ¶o~u~umin; saka to~u…ĺo~u a wawa ¶i apo~uto~uk mi…ĺa…ĺiw pasitimo~u…ĺ ma…ĺa tato~u °asan no~u iwatan(po~uno~un) fina ¶a…¨~…ģan; saka s…ôpat a safa ¶i …ĺa…ĺakan ato~u saka …ĺima safa to~u fafańßijan ¶i …¨~…ģo~u ¶i i ta °akaj rijar, mi…¨~…ģakaw to~u to~upto~up mapawpaw i …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn, nikawrira ¶aaj pakatama to~u ńßaka…ĺ, ¶aaj pakatama to~u …ĺo~uma °, matataŇči ¶ a tato~usa. ta…ĺifańßa…ĺ sa ira ko~u °arikak, o~uni ta °ian nira masatapo~uro~uaj masa…¨~…ģak i rijar, o~u nian ko~uja iko~uraj a ¶i…ĺaŇčasan. mata °…ô…ĺif ko~u ro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ, mato~u °as to~u ¶aŇčra tato~usa, ¶aaj pakatama to~u ro~uma ma…ĺo~uramo~u…¨~…ģ, nano~ujaan o~u nia ma…ĺikakaaj raramo~u…¨~…ģ sato~u ¶aŇčra. sa °ajaw o~u niso~ufo~u ¶an naŇčra tato~usa o~u ka…ĺiŇčs…ôsan pina °o~urip, tinako~u o~u kaŇči ¶, tatakaaj, fafiro~u~uŇč, ńßaro~ukaj. tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč sa pasi…ĺa…ôno~u ko~u n…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ kawas, mio~u ¶o~ur to~u saka fa…ĺo~u a wawa a kawas ¶i tatako~u~usan a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč, ta…ĺifańßa…ĺ sa pakan…ôŇčn…ôŇč ¶aŇčra tato~usa to~u nai kakarajan kawas ma…ĺo~uk…ô…ĺo~un, nawńßani m…ôta…ĺaw sapi…ĺa…ĺiwan a mit…ôfo~u ¶, fo~u °o~utan no~u kawas a mi…ĺi ¶…ĺi ¶ to~u kamatira no~u …¨~…ģ…ômak. itija mafana ° to~u …¨~…ģ…ômakan, so~uŇči…ĺa ° ńßan to~u ni tatako~u~usan pasifana ° ko~u ina no~u kawas, sasini °a…¨~…ģa sa ko~u ¶…¨~…ģa…ĺ, o~u ¶o~ur…ôn ńßo~u ko~u wawa kawas ma…ĺik…ô…ĺo~un mińßino~um tina ma…ĺikakaaj, mińßaj…¨~…ģa mio~u ¶o~ur to~u mi…¨~…ģipo~utaj kawas a ma…ĺik…ô…ĺo~un. sano~ujaan ¶i sa…ĺa…ĺa ¶a…ĺ ato~u sao~urijan a kawas mińßawiki…¨~…ģ to~u ¶…ô ¶aj ao~u…ĺ tajni ńß…ôka…ĺ pasifana ° samaan…ôn ko~u ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģi °i i naiko~uran a mafa…¨~…ģo~u ¶aj no~u …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn a ma…ĺikakaaj, itija maŇča °aj ko~u ka ¶iwawa. pasifana ° ńßan to~u ni tatako~u~usan: "nawńßani o~u ma…ĺikakaaj kamo~u tato~usa, ¶aaj kaŇča °aj mararamo~u…¨~…ģ, o~urasaka k…ô…ĺo~uŇč…ôn ko~u sika…ĺ, pa…ĺa…ô…¨~…ģ tamo~unan tato~usa, ńßa…ôn…ôn ta maŇča °aj ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģi °i ko~u ka ¶iwawa namo~u." nano~ujaan iko~ur ¶iwawa ¶aŇčra ma…ĺikaka to~u to~u…ĺo~uaj wawa to~u fafańßija ato~u ¶…ô ¶aj fainajan, o~u nian ko~u tato~u °asan no~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw. no~u kawas a rajraj.
S.FORM: == Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah == "Milikatay wawa to fafahiya"-Tiyamacan ato "Wawa no riyar kawas" -Felalakac.("ÁôľŚÖČÁöĄŚ•≥Ś≠©"TiyamacanŤąá"śĶ∑Á•ěšĻčŚ≠ź"Felalakac) Ci Tiyamacan, o cecay fafahiya kawas no 'Amis/Pangcah, nawhani o makapahay fafahiyan kaolahen no wawa no riyar ci Falalakac nicefisan malafafahi, orasaka mala o tato'asan to no laloma'an no 'Amis/Pangcah. Ci Tiyamacan o sasafaay wawa to fafahiyan no tasaay kawas ci Madapidap ato ci Keseng. Matira ko soal o samakapahay nengnengen cingra, nikaitiyad ho no ina caay ho kahofaoc i malikat ci'edil saan, citiyad ho ci Madapidap malikat ko 'edil, ikor no kahofoc malokaolahan no laloma'an kaomi'en. Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, tayra i 'alo ci Tiyamacan miradom i, manengneng no wawa no riyar kawas ci Felalakac, kaimahen ni Felalakac kokakapah ningra, nanoya ngitangicen ni Felalakac a malafafahi, o laloma'an ni Tiyamac caay ka sakaala ni Felalakac, tafone to papah no kilang a misimed, palimeken to i laloma' kongkong no kilang ano eca i tatahengan misimed, nikawrira nika milikatay matedi ko tireng ni Tiyamacan mahapineng manengneng, marketer to ci Felalakac pacefcef han to ningra ko riyar i hekal, masanga' to ko lenlen maalol tayra i riyar ci Tiyamacan, itiya patanic han malafafahi. Mapawpaw ci Tiyamacan i riyar, o mama ato ina ningra itira i salawacan no riyar mikotod pasariyar tangasa i kawali ka'amis no Takidis, mafana' o caacaay to pakaliyas ci Felalakasan sato, itiya laliyas sato mama ato ina, nanoya ci Madapidap ato ci Keseng o ka'ilolan to wawa ci Tiyamacan, mala o Dakidakit ato Arongay misimaw i salawacan no riyar. Katengilan no sowal, mapaci'eci kalofafahien ci Tiyamacan i, makakeleng ko kakarayan, o todong pitifekan ningra to felac; ano ci langod ko riyar i, o pifalahan ningra to 'asad ato afih, oy ana 'asad ato afih malapodaw, o kadademakan no kidacay foting i riyar, o todong piwangawang ningra to kamay. "Milikatay wawa to fafahiya"- no satapangan to'asan Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah. Iti:ya ho, ina no kawas ci Madapidap ato mama no kawas ci Keseng a tasaay fa'elohay kawas, malikelon cangra itira 'akawangay katimolay kitakit a Arapanapanayan lotok, misofoc to fainayan kawas ci Ladi'afo, Dadakiyolo, Apotok, Lalakan, fafahiyan kawas ci Doc, Tiyamacan a 'enem wawa a kawas. Nikawrira ya cipoyapoy ko ina a kawas ci Tiyamacan i, ira ko malikatay i tiyad, mahapinang manengneng ko laloma'ay, masofoc mahapinang o makapahay nengnengen o fafahiya wawa a kawas. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, o safa fafahiyan masadak a miladom, i fatad no lalan malitemoh ko wawa no riyar kawas ci Felalakacan, nanoya maolah patangic a malofafahien, nanoya paro no loma' misakimokimor misimed milaliw. Nikawrira manengneng caay pakasimed, marketer a palalenlen to sapicefis to sasafaay a safa to fafahiyan milaliw. O ka'ilol no ina ci Madapidap to sasafaay wawa to fafahiyan, mala molengaway i tonotono'an a Dakidakit, o mama ci Keseng mala Arongay misimaw to salawacan no riyar; o sakakaay ci Tadi'Afo milimek tayra i lotok, ikor mala tato'asan no Atayal finacadan; saka tosa a kaka ci Dadakiyolo milaliw pasi'etip mala o tato'asan no 'etipay yincumin; saka tolo a wawa ci Apotok milaliw pasitimol mala tato'asan no Iwatan(Ponon) finacadan; saka sepat a safa ci Lalakan ato saka lima safa to fafahiyan ci Doci i ta'akay riyar, midakaw to toptop mapawpaw i lenlen, nikawrira caay pakatama to hakal, caay pakatama to loma', matatangic a tatosa. Talifahal sa ira ko 'arikak, oni ta'ian nira masataporoay masadak i riyar, o nian koya ikoray a Cilangasan. Mata'elif ko romi'ami'ad, mato'as to cangra tatosa, caay pakatama to roma maloramod, nanoyaan o nia malikakaay raramod sato cangra. Sa'ayaw o nisofocan nangra tatosa o kalingsesan pina'orip, tinako o Kangic, Tatakaay, Fafirung, Harokay. Tatodong sa pasilaeno ko nengneng no Cidal kawas, miocor to saka falo a wawa a kawas ci Tatakusan a minengneng, talifahal sa pakanengneng cangra tatosa to nai kakarayan kawas malokelon, nawhani metalaw sapilaliwan a mitefoc, fo'otan no kawas a miliclic to kamatira no demak. Itiya mafana' to demakan, songila' han to ni Tatakusan pasifana' ko ina no kawas, sasini'ada sa ko Cdal, ocoren ho ko wawa kawas malikelon mihinom tina malikakaay, mihayda miocor to midipotay kawas a malikelon. Sanoyaan ci Salalacal ato Saoriyan a kawas mihawikid to cecay aol tayni hekal pasifana' samaanen ko kadadi'i i naikoran a mafadocay no lenlen a malikakaay, itiya manga'ay ko kaciwawa. Pasifana' han to ni Tatakusan: "Nawhani o malikakaay kamo tatosa, caay kanga'ay mararamod, orasaka kelongen ko sikal, palaed tamonan tatosa, haenen ta manga'ay madadi'i ko kaciwawa namo." Nanoyaan ikor ciwawa cangra malikaka to toloay wawa to fafahiya ato cecay fainayan, o nian ko tato'asan no tamdamdaw. No kawas a rayray.
S.PHON: == kawakawasan rato~uńß no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß == "mi…ĺikataj wawa to~u fafańßija"-tijama ¶an ato~u "wawa no~u rijar kawas" -f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶.("*****"tijama ¶an*"****"f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶) ¶i tijama ¶an, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj fafańßija kawas no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß, nawńßani o~u makapańßaj fafańßijan kao~u…ĺańß…ôn no~u wawa no~u rijar ¶i fa…ĺa…ĺaka ¶ ni ¶…ôfisan ma…ĺafafańßi, o~urasaka ma…ĺa o~u tato~u °asan to~u no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß. ¶i tijama ¶an o~u sasafaaj wawa to~u fafańßijan no~u tasaaj kawas ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap ato~u ¶i k…ôs…ôŇč. matira ko~u so~ua…ĺ o~u samakapańßaj n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn ¶iŇčra, nikaitija…¨~…ģ ńßo~u no~u ina ¶aaj ńßo~u kańßo~ufao~u ¶ i ma…ĺikat ¶i °…ô…¨~…ģi…ĺ saan, ¶itija…¨~…ģ ńßo~u ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap ma…ĺikat ko~u °…ô…¨~…ģi…ĺ, iko~ur no~u kańßo~ufo~u ¶ ma…ĺo~ukao~u…ĺańßan no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an kao~umi °…ôn. kawakawasan rato~uńß no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß. ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, tajra i °a…ĺo~u ¶i tijama ¶an mira…¨~…ģo~um i, man…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u wawa no~u rijar kawas ¶i f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶, kaimańß…ôn ni f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶ ko~ukakapańß niŇčra, nano~uja ŇčitaŇči ¶…ôn ni f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶ a ma…ĺafafańßi, o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ni tijama ¶ ¶aaj ka sakaa…ĺa ni f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶, tafo~un…ô to~u papańß no~u ki…ĺaŇč a misim…ô…¨~…ģ, pa…ĺim…ôk…ôn to~u i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° ko~uŇčko~uŇč no~u ki…ĺaŇč ano~u …ô ¶a i tatańß…ôŇčan misim…ô…¨~…ģ, nikawrira nika mi…ĺikataj mat…ô…¨~…ģi ko~u tir…ôŇč ni tijama ¶an mańßapin…ôŇč man…ôŇčn…ôŇč, mark…ôt…ôr to~u ¶i f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶ pa ¶…ôf ¶…ôf ńßan to~u niŇčra ko~u rijar i ńß…ôka…ĺ, masaŇča ° to~u ko~u …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn maa…ĺo~u…ĺ tajra i rijar ¶i tijama ¶an, itija patani ¶ ńßan ma…ĺafafańßi. mapawpaw ¶i tijama ¶an i rijar, o~u mama ato~u ina niŇčra itira i sa…ĺawa ¶an no~u rijar miko~uto~u…¨~…ģ pasarijar taŇčasa i kawa…ĺi ka °amis no~u taki…¨~…ģis, mafana ° o~u ¶aa ¶aaj to~u paka…ĺijas ¶i f…ô…ĺa…ĺakasan sato~u, itija …ĺa…ĺijas sato~u mama ato~u ina, nano~uja ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap ato~u ¶i k…ôs…ôŇč o~u ka °i…ĺo~u…ĺan to~u wawa ¶i tijama ¶an, ma…ĺa o~u …¨~…ģaki…¨~…ģakit ato~u aro~uŇčaj misimaw i sa…ĺawa ¶an no~u rijar. kat…ôŇči…ĺan no~u so~uwa…ĺ, mapa ¶i °…ô ¶i ka…ĺo~ufafańßi…ôn ¶i tijama ¶an i, makak…ô…ĺ…ôŇč ko~u kakarajan, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč pitif…ôkan niŇčra to~u f…ô…ĺa ¶; ano~u ¶i …ĺaŇčo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u rijar i, o~u pifa…ĺańßan niŇčra to~u °asa…¨~…ģ ato~u afińß, o~uj ana °asa…¨~…ģ ato~u afińß ma…ĺapo~u…¨~…ģaw, o~u ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômakan no~u ki…¨~…ģa ¶aj fo~utiŇč i rijar, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč piwaŇčawaŇč niŇčra to~u kamaj. "mi…ĺikataj wawa to~u fafańßija"- no~u satapaŇčan to~u °asan kawakawasan rato~uńß no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß. iti:ja ńßo~u, ina no~u kawas ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap ato~u mama no~u kawas ¶i k…ôs…ôŇč a tasaaj fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj kawas, ma…ĺik…ô…ĺo~un ¶aŇčra itira °akawaŇčaj katimo~u…ĺaj kitakit a arapanapanajan …ĺo~uto~uk, miso~ufo~u ¶ to~u fainajan kawas ¶i …ĺa…¨~…ģi °afo~u, …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģakijo~u…ĺo~u, apo~uto~uk, …ĺa…ĺakan, fafańßijan kawas ¶i …¨~…ģo~u ¶, tijama ¶an a °…ôn…ôm wawa a kawas. nikawrira ja ¶ipo~ujapo~uj ko~u ina a kawas ¶i tijama ¶an i, ira ko~u ma…ĺikataj i tija…¨~…ģ, mańßapinaŇč man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj, maso~ufo~u ¶ mańßapinaŇč o~u makapańßaj n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn o~u fafańßija wawa a kawas. ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u safa fafańßijan masa…¨~…ģak a mi…ĺa…¨~…ģo~um, i fata…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺa…ĺan ma…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u wawa no~u rijar kawas ¶i f…ô…ĺa…ĺaka ¶an, nano~uja mao~u…ĺańß pataŇči ¶ a ma…ĺo~ufafańßi…ôn, nano~uja paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° misakimo~ukimo~ur misim…ô…¨~…ģ mi…ĺa…ĺiw. nikawrira man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ¶aaj pakasim…ô…¨~…ģ, mark…ôt…ôr a pa…ĺa…ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn to~u sapi ¶…ôfis to~u sasafaaj a safa to~u fafańßijan mi…ĺa…ĺiw. o~u ka °i…ĺo~u…ĺ no~u ina ¶i ma…¨~…ģapi…¨~…ģap to~u sasafaaj wawa to~u fafańßijan, ma…ĺa mo~u…ĺ…ôŇčawaj i to~uno~uto~uno~u °an a …¨~…ģaki…¨~…ģakit, o~u mama ¶i k…ôs…ôŇč ma…ĺa aro~uŇčaj misimaw to~u sa…ĺawa ¶an no~u rijar; o~u sakakaaj ¶i ta…¨~…ģi °afo~u mi…ĺim…ôk tajra i …ĺo~uto~uk, iko~ur ma…ĺa tato~u °asan no~u ataja…ĺ fina ¶a…¨~…ģan; saka to~usa a kaka ¶i …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģakijo~u…ĺo~u mi…ĺa…ĺiw pasi °…ôtip ma…ĺa o~u tato~u °asan no~u °…ôtipaj jin ¶o~u~umin; saka to~u…ĺo~u a wawa ¶i apo~uto~uk mi…ĺa…ĺiw pasitimo~u…ĺ ma…ĺa tato~u °asan no~u iwatan(po~uno~un) fina ¶a…¨~…ģan; saka s…ôpat a safa ¶i …ĺa…ĺakan ato~u saka …ĺima safa to~u fafańßijan ¶i …¨~…ģo~u ¶i i ta °akaj rijar, mi…¨~…ģakaw to~u to~upto~up mapawpaw i …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn, nikawrira ¶aaj pakatama to~u ńßaka…ĺ, ¶aaj pakatama to~u …ĺo~uma °, matataŇči ¶ a tato~usa. ta…ĺifańßa…ĺ sa ira ko~u °arikak, o~uni ta °ian nira masatapo~uro~uaj masa…¨~…ģak i rijar, o~u nian ko~uja iko~uraj a ¶i…ĺaŇčasan. mata °…ô…ĺif ko~u ro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ, mato~u °as to~u ¶aŇčra tato~usa, ¶aaj pakatama to~u ro~uma ma…ĺo~uramo~u…¨~…ģ, nano~ujaan o~u nia ma…ĺikakaaj raramo~u…¨~…ģ sato~u ¶aŇčra. sa °ajaw o~u niso~ufo~u ¶an naŇčra tato~usa o~u ka…ĺiŇčs…ôsan pina °o~urip, tinako~u o~u kaŇči ¶, tatakaaj, fafiro~u~uŇč, ńßaro~ukaj. tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč sa pasi…ĺa…ôno~u ko~u n…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ kawas, mio~u ¶o~ur to~u saka fa…ĺo~u a wawa a kawas ¶i tatako~u~usan a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč, ta…ĺifańßa…ĺ sa pakan…ôŇčn…ôŇč ¶aŇčra tato~usa to~u nai kakarajan kawas ma…ĺo~uk…ô…ĺo~un, nawńßani m…ôta…ĺaw sapi…ĺa…ĺiwan a mit…ôfo~u ¶, fo~u °o~utan no~u kawas a mi…ĺi ¶…ĺi ¶ to~u kamatira no~u …¨~…ģ…ômak. itija mafana ° to~u …¨~…ģ…ômakan, so~uŇči…ĺa ° ńßan to~u ni tatako~u~usan pasifana ° ko~u ina no~u kawas, sasini °a…¨~…ģa sa ko~u ¶…¨~…ģa…ĺ, o~u ¶o~ur…ôn ńßo~u ko~u wawa kawas ma…ĺik…ô…ĺo~un mińßino~um tina ma…ĺikakaaj, mińßaj…¨~…ģa mio~u ¶o~ur to~u mi…¨~…ģipo~utaj kawas a ma…ĺik…ô…ĺo~un. sano~ujaan ¶i sa…ĺa…ĺa ¶a…ĺ ato~u sao~urijan a kawas mińßawiki…¨~…ģ to~u ¶…ô ¶aj ao~u…ĺ tajni ńß…ôka…ĺ pasifana ° samaan…ôn ko~u ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģi °i i naiko~uran a mafa…¨~…ģo~u ¶aj no~u …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn a ma…ĺikakaaj, itija maŇča °aj ko~u ka ¶iwawa. pasifana ° ńßan to~u ni tatako~u~usan: "nawńßani o~u ma…ĺikakaaj kamo~u tato~usa, ¶aaj kaŇča °aj mararamo~u…¨~…ģ, o~urasaka k…ô…ĺo~uŇč…ôn ko~u sika…ĺ, pa…ĺa…ô…¨~…ģ tamo~unan tato~usa, ńßa…ôn…ôn ta maŇča °aj ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģi °i ko~u ka ¶iwawa namo~u." nano~ujaan iko~ur ¶iwawa ¶aŇčra ma…ĺikaka to~u to~u…ĺo~uaj wawa to~u fafańßija ato~u ¶…ô ¶aj fainajan, o~u nian ko~u tato~u °asan no~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw. no~u kawas a rajraj.
